title: BOXOB 2pcs Stainless Steel Fish Spatula, Durable Fish Mental Spatula Set Kitchen Slotted Turner for Kitchen Flipping Pancakes Eggs & More Cooking Tool Accessories
features: Package Includes: You will get 2 pieces of stainless steel fish spatulas, practical functions and sufficient quantity can meet your daily use needs, bringing more convenience to your kitchen cooking.

Awesome Material: This fish spatula is mainly made of stainless steel, which is strong and durable, has good heat resistance, can withstand high cooking temperatures, will not be easily damaged, and you can use it with confidence.
Product Size: The size of this stainless steel fish spatula is 28x8cm/11x3.2in, which is moderate in size and relatively light in weight. The wooden handle can give you a better using experience.
Versatility: Our stainless steel fish spatula is suitable for turning and flipping a variety of foods, such as fish, eggs, pancakes and steaks, making it a kitchen must-have.

Good Design: The stainless steel fish spatula has a non-stick coating design, so your food will not easily stick to the fish spatula, and the handle has an anti-slip design, making your grip easier and giving you a better cooking experience.
description: Specification: Color: silver, wood color Material: stainless steel, wood Product Size: 28x8cm/11x3.2in Package details: 2 x fish spatula Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between different monitors, there may be a slight color difference existed.
